SEARCH
Package gov.cdc.izgateway.hub

Class BaseGatewayController

java.lang.Object
gov.cdc.izgateway.soap.SoapControllerBase
gov.cdc.izgateway.hub.BaseGatewayController
Direct Known Subclasses:
CDCWSDLController, HubWSDLController
public abstract class BaseGatewayController extends gov.cdc.izgateway.soap.SoapControllerBase
Base controller class that contains common functionality shared between HubWSDLController and CDCWSDLController.

    • connectivityTest

      protected org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<?> connectivityTest(gov.cdc.izgateway.soap.message.ConnectivityTestRequest connectivityTest, String destinationId) throws gov.cdc.izgateway.soap.fault.Fault
      Overrides:
      connectivityTest in class gov.cdc.izgateway.soap.SoapControllerBase
      Throws:
      gov.cdc.izgateway.soap.fault.Fault

    • checkAccess

      protected void checkAccess(String destId) throws gov.cdc.izgateway.soap.fault.SecurityFault
      Checks to see if a user can send to the destination. The method allows access controls to be set on a destination to allow or prohibit users access to a specific destination. If no access controls have been set up, then users are simply expected to follow policy, but there is no other enforcement. Checks to see an access control group exists for the specified destination. 1. If none does, simply returns. 2. If the user has the ADMIN role, also returns. 3. Otherwise, checks to see if the user is a member of the group given by the destination name, and if they are, returns. 4. If they are not a member, this method throws a security fault notifying the user that they cannot send messages to the specified group.
      Throws:
      gov.cdc.izgateway.soap.fault.SecurityFault - if the user is not permitted to access the destination.

    • submitSingleMessage

      protected org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<?> submitSingleMessage(gov.cdc.izgateway.soap.message.SubmitSingleMessageRequest submitSingleMessage, String destinationId) throws gov.cdc.izgateway.soap.fault.Fault
